purpose: Generated-output proof for Wave70 mf70_face_identity_critical mask routing using the active MOD-17 Canny v3 portrait as source.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: very subtle photoreal identity-critical face preservation pass, preserve exact face identity, preserve both eyes, eye color, gaze direction, nose shape, lip shape and lip color, preserve jawline and hairline, natural skin texture, consistent portrait lighting, no background or clothing change
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: identity change, face shape drift, different person, eye color change, gaze drift, distorted eyes, crossed eyes, asymmetrical eyes, nose deformation, changed lips, deformed mouth, extra teeth, jawline change, hairline change, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed face, new jewelry, new clothing, background change, watermark, text

qa_focus: nose, lips, jawline, and hairline preservation
mask edge blending across identity-critical face region
no over-smoothing or plastic skin regression

source_qa_driver.change_summary: Use the Wave70 identity-critical mask as the inpaint mask with low denoise to prove local generated-output routing while minimizing identity drift.
